title: Cosmetics E-Commerce Website

requirements.text: Implement a backend data model and actor methods for cosmetics products, including fields for: id, name, category, description, price, imageUrl, stock quantity, and featured flag. Provide CRUD operations: addProduct, getProducts, getProductById, updateProduct, deleteProduct, and a query to fetch featured products.

quotes: create a website for selling cosmetics

acceptanceCriteria: Products can be created, read, updated, and deleted via backend methods.
Products have all required fields including category, price, stock, and featured flag.
Featured products can be queried separately.

requirements.text: Implement a backend shopping cart model: each cart is keyed by a session/user identifier, containing line items (productId, quantity). Provide methods: addToCart, removeFromCart, updateCartItem, getCart, and clearCart.

quotes: create a website for selling cosmetics

acceptanceCriteria: Cart items can be added, updated, and removed.
The current cart can be retrieved by session/user key.
Cart can be cleared after checkout.

requirements.text: Implement a backend orders model. Provide a placeOrder method that accepts a cart, creates an order record with fields: id, items, totalPrice, status (pending/completed), and timestamp. Provide a getOrders query to retrieve all orders.

quotes: create a website for selling cosmetics

acceptanceCriteria: Orders are created from cart contents with a total price calculation.
Each order has a unique ID, item list, total, status, and timestamp.
Orders can be retrieved via a query method.

requirements.text: Build a Homepage with: a full-width hero banner section with a headline and call-to-action button, a 'Featured Products' section showing featured products in a responsive grid, and a promotional banner or marquee strip highlighting offers.

quotes: create a website for selling cosmetics

acceptanceCriteria: Hero banner is displayed at the top with a headline and CTA.
Featured products are fetched from the backend and displayed in a grid.
Promotional section is visible below the hero.

requirements.text: Build a Product Catalog page that displays all cosmetics products in a responsive grid. Include filter controls for product category and price range. Each product card shows the product image, name, category, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button.

quotes: create a website for selling cosmetics

acceptanceCriteria: All products are listed in a responsive grid layout.
Category and price range filters are functional.
Each card has image, name, category, price, and Add to Cart button.
Adding to cart calls the backend addToCart method.

requirements.text: Build a Product Detail page accessible from product cards. Display the product's image, name, category, full description, price, stock status, and an 'Add to Cart' button with quantity selector.

quotes: create a website for selling cosmetics

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to a product detail page shows all product fields.
Quantity selector allows selecting how many to add.
Add to Cart button is disabled when stock is 0.
Page is accessible via a route such as /product/:id.

requirements.text: Build a Shopping Cart page that displays current cart line items with product name, image, unit price, quantity controls, and line total. Show the cart subtotal, and provide a 'Proceed to Checkout' button and a 'Remove' option per item.

quotes: create a website for selling cosmetics

acceptanceCriteria: All cart items are listed with image, name, price, and quantity.
Quantity can be increased/decreased per item.
Items can be removed from the cart.
Subtotal is calculated and displayed.
Proceed to Checkout button is present.

requirements.text: Build a Checkout page with a simple order summary and a 'Place Order' button. On confirmation, call the backend placeOrder method, clear the cart, and display an order confirmation message with the order ID.

quotes: create a website for selling cosmetics

acceptanceCriteria: Order summary lists items and total before placement.
Clicking Place Order calls the backend and returns an order ID.
Cart is cleared after successful order.
A confirmation message with the order ID is shown.

requirements.text: Apply a luxurious, clean visual theme throughout the site: a soft warm neutral palette (ivory, blush rose, champagne gold accents), elegant serif headings, smooth hover transitions on cards and buttons, generous whitespace, and a sticky top navigation bar with the brand logo, navigation links (Home, Shop, Cart), and a cart icon with item count badge.

quotes: create a website for selling cosmetics

acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses ivory/blush/gold tones consistently across all pages.
Headings use an elegant serif or refined font style.
Navigation bar is sticky and shows cart item count.
Cards and buttons have smooth hover effects.
Layout uses consistent spacing and whitespace.

requirements.text: Render the generated static image assets (hero banner, product placeholder images) from frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in the Homepage hero, product cards, and detail pages.

quotes: create a website for selling cosmetics

acceptanceCriteria: Hero banner image is loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated.
Product placeholder images are served from the same directory.
No broken image links on any page.

constraints: All backend logic must reside in a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo.
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
No external payment or third-party API integrations.
nonGoals: Admin dashboard for managing products via the UI.
Real-time inventory sync or WebSocket features.

required: Elegant cosmetics hero banner with soft blush and ivory tones, gold accent light streaks, and artfully arranged makeup and skincare products on a marble surface (hero-banner.dim_1400x500.png)
Minimalist cosmetics product placeholder showing a sleek bottle silhouette on a blush-pink background with soft shadows (product-placeholder.dim_600x600.png)
Promotional strip background with a warm champagne gradient and scattered rose petals texture (promo-banner.dim_1400x120.png)
